name: concept_set_requires_standard_concepts
description: Concept sets used for clinical cohort queries should use standard concepts.
logic: Check concept.standard_concept='S' when building concept sets.

name: concept_set_descendants_via_concept_ancestor
description: Descendant expansion must use concept_ancestor.
logic: If descendants are intended but concept_ancestor is not used, flag.

name: concept_set_invalid_reason_filtered
description: Concept sets should exclude invalid concepts.

name: concept_set_domain_consistency
description: Concept sets should only contain concepts belonging to the expected domain.
logic: Check concept.domain_id matches target table domain.

name: concept_set_no_mixed_domains
description: Mixing domains in one concept set should be avoided unless explicitly labeled.

name: concept_set_classification_handling
description: Classification concepts should be expanded to standard descendants.
logic: If concept.standard_concept='C', descendants must be included.

name: concept_set_vocabulary_filtering
description: Concept sets based on concept_code must also specify vocabulary.

name: concept_set_synonym_search
description: Concept discovery should include concept_synonym.

name: concept_set_descendant_self_handling
description: concept_ancestor includes self rows.

name: concept_set_mapping_from_source
description: Source concepts should be mapped using 'Maps to'.

name: condition_era_persistence_window
description: Condition eras typically merge occurrences within a persistence window.
logic: Check time gap between condition events.

name: condition_era_ordering_by_date
description: Condition era construction requires ordered events.

name: condition_era_requires_person_partition
description: Era construction must partition by person.

name: drug_era_gap_days_logic
description: Drug eras merge exposures when gap <= persistence window.

name: drug_era_end_date_derivation
description: Drug era end date derived from exposure end.

name: drug_era_days_supply_usage
description: Drug era duration may rely on days_supply.

name: drug_era_overlap_merge
description: Overlapping drug exposures should merge into one era.

name: era_concept_grouping
description: Era generation grouped by concept and person.

name: era_minimum_length_validation
description: Eras should not produce negative durations.

name: era_temporal_sorting_required
description: Era construction requires chronological order.

name: event_within_observation_period
description: Events should fall within observation period.
logic: Check event_date BETWEEN op_start AND op_end.

name: multiple_observation_periods_allowed
description: Persons may have multiple observation periods.
logic: Avoid assuming one record per person.

name: observation_period_gap_detection
description: Observation periods may contain gaps.
logic: Ensure event joins check correct interval.

name: event_before_observation_start
description: Events before observation period should be excluded.

name: event_after_observation_end
description: Events after observation period should be excluded.

name: cohort_entry_requires_observation
description: Cohort entry typically requires prior observation.

name: observation_period_overlap_validation
description: Observation periods should not overlap.

name: observation_period_duration_positive
description: Observation periods must have positive duration.

name: observation_period_join_person
description: Observation period joins must use person_id.

name: observation_period_event_alignment
description: Clinical events should align with observation windows.

name: measurement_requires_unit
description: Numeric measurements should specify units.

name: measurement_unit_standardization
description: Measurements should use standard units.

name: measurement_cross_unit_comparison
description: Comparisons across different units require conversion.

name: measurement_range_usage
description: Reference ranges should be used for abnormal detection.

name: measurement_operator_handling
description: Operator concept affects numeric interpretation.

name: measurement_value_type_validation
description: Measurement may use value_as_concept_id.

name: measurement_null_value_handling
description: Measurements with NULL numeric values should be filtered.

name: measurement_time_alignment
description: Measurement datetime may differ from visit.

name: measurement_duplicate_detection
description: Duplicate measurement records may occur.

name: measurement_unit_grouping
description: Aggregations should group by unit.

name: episode_requires_concept_filter
description: Episode queries should filter by episode_concept_id.

name: episode_event_join_event_table
description: episode_event must link to correct domain table.

name: episode_event_requires_valid_event_id
description: event_id must reference a valid domain record.

name: episode_event_person_consistency
description: Episode and linked events must belong to same person.

name: episode_start_before_end
description: Episode start must precede end.

name: episode_event_temporal_alignment
description: Episode events should fall within episode window.

name: episode_concept_domain_validation
description: Episode concept must belong to Episode domain.

name: episode_multiple_events_allowed
description: Episodes may link to multiple events.

name: episode_event_domain_consistency
description: Episode events should reference valid domain concepts.

name: episode_event_relationship_validation
description: Episode event relationships must be valid.

name: fact_relationship_requires_relationship
description: Fact relationships require a relationship concept.

name: fact_relationship_domain_consistency
description: Domain ids must match linked tables.

name: fact_relationship_valid_concepts
description: Concepts used must be valid.

name: fact_relationship_bidirectional_logic
description: Relationships may be directional.

name: fact_relationship_event_exists
description: Referenced events must exist.

name: fact_relationship_no_self_reference
description: Self linking relationships should be rare.

name: fact_relationship_domain_pair_check
description: Ensure compatible domain pairs.

name: fact_relationship_temporal_alignment
description: Related events should align temporally.

name: fact_relationship_duplicate_detection
description: Duplicate relationships should be avoided.

name: fact_relationship_concept_validation
description: Relationship concepts must exist in concept table.
